LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER OF DISCHARGE AND AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER $3,364.57 AS REASONABLE FEES AND COSTS, WHICH INCLUDES $2500 IN FEES. WHILE PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO RECOVERY OF FEES, ITS REQUEST FOR FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF APPROXIMATELY HALF OF THE INTERPLEADED AMOUNT IS NOT REASONABLE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2012 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-01-2012 Set For Case Management Conference On Jul-25-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar May-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - C. KUNG, TEL. NO. 238-1998, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT IOK-CHOI KUNG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT ENTRY is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)

Ntc Of Motion For Order To Vacate Default Entry
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CHIU KUNG'S Motion For Order To Vacate Default Entry is Granted. No opposition filed. The court signed the order submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Order To Oppose Pltfs Motion For Order Of Discharge And Demurrer Of Atty'S Fees And Costs Award Filed On April 05,2012; Memo Of P And A ; Joint Declaration
Off Calendar May-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CHIU KUNG, IOK-CHOI KUNG'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO OPPOSE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER OF DISCHARGE AND DEMURRER OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS AWARD FILED ON APRIL 05, 2012.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar. This motion is, in practical effect, an opposition to plaintiff's motion and has been treated as such. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion For Order Of Discharge And Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar May-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER OF DISCHARGE AND AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS.
Appearances: Patrick D. Reider of Hershorin & Henry LLP (949.859.5600 x318) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and moving party; Chiu Kung (238.1998) defendant and responding party appearing in propria persona.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted in part. Plaintiff shall recover $3,364.57 as reasonable fees and costs, which includes $2500 in fees. While plaintiff is entitled to recovery of fees, its request for fees in the amount of approximately half of the interpleaded amount is not reasonable. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
